content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.8 WARN — Google Sign-In is the sole third-party login option (App/LoginView.swift:9-13, `import GoogleSignIn`), with no `ASAuthorizationAppleID` usage found anywhere and no exempt pattern (e.g., enterprise-only, existing account) apparent.
Pierre: Apple requires that apps offering third-party social login (like "One-tap Google sign-in", promoted in description.txt) also offer Sign in with Apple as an equivalent option, unless a documented exemption applies. Here I only see GIDSignIn usage and no Apple auth code, nor any enterprise/education exemption context. Add a "Sign in with Apple" button alongside Google sign-in, or document why an exemption applies before submission.
